languages.text: "Я, Ювенна фон Валанциус, пользуясь правом, дарованным мне Патентом, в соответствии с законом 8913-12-4 из 6213-го тома Лекс Даргонус, указом от сего дня жалую дворянское звание Изимонду Зауэрбэку и всем его законным наследникам до скончания века. Да будут они верно нести свою службу и не посрамят честь своих господ."

traits.locale_text: "Я, Ювенна фон Валанциус, пользуясь правом, дарованным мне Патентом, в соответствии с законом 8913-12-4 из 6213-го тома Лекс Даргонус, указом от сего дня жалую дворянское звание Изимонду Зауэрбэку и всем его законным наследникам до скончания века. Да будут они верно нести свою службу и не посрамят честь своих господ."

languages.text: "I, Juvenna von Valancius, exercising the right granted to me by the Warrant, in accordance with Law 8913-12-4 of the 6213th Volume of the Lex Dargonus, by decree this day hereby bestow a title of nobility upon Isimond Sauerback and all his lawful heirs until the end of the age. May they serve faithfully and not disgrace the honour of their lords."

Да будут они верно нести свою службу и не посрамят честь своих господ."

May they serve faithfully and not disgrace the honour of their lords."

May they serve faithfully and not disgrace the honour of their lords."

"I, Juvenna von Valancius, exercising the right granted to me by the Warrant, in accordance with Law 8913-12-4 of the 6213th Volume of the Lex Dargonus, by decree this day hereby bestow a title of nobility upon Isimond Sauerback and all his lawful heirs until the end of the age. "I, Juvenna von Valancius, exercising the right granted to me by the Warrant, in accordance with Law 8913-12-4 of the 6213th Volume of the Lex Dargonus, by decree this day hereby bestow a title of nobility upon Isimond Sauerback and all his lawful heirs until the end of the age. May they serve faithfully and not disgrace the honour of their lords."

languages.text: "Ich, Juvenna von Valancius, versetze Isimond Sauerback und seine rechtmäßigen Erben bis zum Ende des Zeitalters Kraft des mir verliehenen Handelsbriefs in Einklang mit Gesetz 8913-12-4 aus Band 6.213 des Lex Dargonus per Dekret in den Adelsstand. Mögen sie ihren Herren treue Dienste leisten und ihre Ehre nicht beflecken."
languages.original_text: "I, Juvenna von Valancius, exercising the right granted to me by the Warrant, in accordance with Law 8913-12-4 of the 6213th Volume of the Lex Dargonus, by decree this day hereby bestow a title of nobility upon Isimond Sauerback and all his lawful heirs until the end of the age. May they serve faithfully and not disgrace the honour of their lords."

traits.locale_text: "Ich, Juvenna von Valancius, versetze Isimond Sauerback und seine rechtmäßigen Erben bis zum Ende des Zeitalters Kraft des mir verliehenen Handelsbriefs in Einklang mit Gesetz 8913-12-4 aus Band 6.213 des Lex Dargonus per Dekret in den Adelsstand. Mögen sie ihren Herren treue Dienste leisten und ihre Ehre nicht beflecken."

languages.text: “我，尤文娜·冯·瓦兰修斯，依据贸易授状授予我的权利，遵照《达戈努斯法典》第6213卷8913-12-4号法令，于今日特此下令，将贵族头衔赐予伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克及其所有合法继承人，直至时代终结。愿他们忠诚效力，不辱领主之荣耀。”
languages.original_text: "I, Juvenna von Valancius, exercising the right granted to me by the Warrant, in accordance with Law 8913-12-4 of the 6213th Volume of the Lex Dargonus, by decree this day hereby bestow a title of nobility upon Isimond Sauerback and all his lawful heirs until the end of the age. May they serve faithfully and not disgrace the honour of their lords."

traits.locale_text: “我，尤文娜·冯·瓦兰修斯，依据贸易授状授予我的权利，遵照《达戈努斯法典》第6213卷8913-12-4号法令，于今日特此下令，将贵族头衔赐予伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克及其所有合法继承人，直至时代终结。愿他们忠诚效力，不辱领主之荣耀。”

languages.text: « Moi, Juvenna von Valancius, en vertu de l'autorité que me confère la lettre de marque et en accord avec la loi 8913-12-4 du 6213e volume de la Lex Dargonus, octroie ce jour par décret un titre de noblesse au dénommé Isimond Sauerback ainsi qu'à tous ses héritiers, et ce, jusqu'à nouvel ordre.
languages.original_text: "I, Juvenna von Valancius, exercising the right granted to me by the Warrant, in accordance with Law 8913-12-4 of the 6213th Volume of the Lex Dargonus, by decree this day hereby bestow a title of nobility upon Isimond Sauerback and all his lawful heirs until the end of the age. May they serve faithfully and not disgrace the honour of their lords."

traits.locale_text: « Moi, Juvenna von Valancius, en vertu de l'autorité que me confère la lettre de marque et en accord avec la loi 8913-12-4 du 6213e volume de la Lex Dargonus, octroie ce jour par décret un titre de noblesse au dénommé Isimond Sauerback ainsi qu'à tous ses héritiers, et ce, jusqu'à nouvel ordre.

languages.text: «Yo, Juvenna von Valancius, ejerciendo el derecho que me ha sido otorgado por la Patente, en concordancia con la ley 8913-12-4 del volumen 6213 de la Lex Dargonus, por la presente decreto la concesión de un título nobiliario a Isimond Sauerback y a sus legítimos herederos hasta el fin de los tiempos. Que sirvan con lealtad y no mancillen el honor de sus señores».
languages.original_text: "I, Juvenna von Valancius, exercising the right granted to me by the Warrant, in accordance with Law 8913-12-4 of the 6213th Volume of the Lex Dargonus, by decree this day hereby bestow a title of nobility upon Isimond Sauerback and all his lawful heirs until the end of the age. May they serve faithfully and not disgrace the honour of their lords."

traits.locale_text: «Yo, Juvenna von Valancius, ejerciendo el derecho que me ha sido otorgado por la Patente, en concordancia con la ley 8913-12-4 del volumen 6213 de la Lex Dargonus, por la presente decreto la concesión de un título nobiliario a Isimond Sauerback y a sus legítimos herederos hasta el fin de los tiempos. Que sirvan con lealtad y no mancillen el honor de sus señores».

languages.text: "Ben Juvenna von Valancius; Lex Dargonus'un 6213. Cildi'nin 8913-12-4 sayılı Yasası uyarınca Ruhsatname'nin bana verdiği hakkı kullanarak, bugünkü fermanla İsimond Sauerback'e ve tüm meşru vârislerine çağların sonuna dek bir soyluluk ünvanı bahşediyorum. Sadakatle hizmet etsinler ve efendilerinin onurunu lekelemesinler."
languages.original_text: "I, Juvenna von Valancius, exercising the right granted to me by the Warrant, in accordance with Law 8913-12-4 of the 6213th Volume of the Lex Dargonus, by decree this day hereby bestow a title of nobility upon Isimond Sauerback and all his lawful heirs until the end of the age. May they serve faithfully and not disgrace the honour of their lords."

traits.locale_text: "Ben Juvenna von Valancius; Lex Dargonus'un 6213. Cildi'nin 8913-12-4 sayılı Yasası uyarınca Ruhsatname'nin bana verdiği hakkı kullanarak, bugünkü fermanla İsimond Sauerback'e ve tüm meşru vârislerine çağların sonuna dek bir soyluluk ünvanı bahşediyorum. Sadakatle hizmet etsinler ve efendilerinin onurunu lekelemesinler."

languages.text: 「私は、ジュベナ・フォン・ヴァランキウス。法令8913-12-4に従い、法令集6213号に記された権利に基づき、この日に、イシモンド・ザウアーバックと彼の正当な相続人たちに、爵位を授ける。彼らに忠誠を尽くし、主の栄誉を汚すことのないよう。」
languages.original_text: "I, Juvenna von Valancius, exercising the right granted to me by the Warrant, in accordance with Law 8913-12-4 of the 6213th Volume of the Lex Dargonus, by decree this day hereby bestow a title of nobility upon Isimond Sauerback and all his lawful heirs until the end of the age. May they serve faithfully and not disgrace the honour of their lords."

traits.locale_text: 「私は、ジュベナ・フォン・ヴァランキウス。法令8913-12-4に従い、法令集6213号に記された権利に基づき、この日に、イシモンド・ザウアーバックと彼の正当な相続人たちに、爵位を授ける。彼らに忠誠を尽くし、主の栄誉を汚すことのないよう。」
